chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 170 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.1030/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.1031/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.1032/2025 (R/Surety) 04.02.2026 None present for the applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Niaz Ahmed, who on 16.12.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing original defence savings certificate of such amount, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from letter dated 17.12.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
